user_query: I want to plan a cocktail night with my family and try different cocktails made with gin, and also get a random nonalcoholic cocktail recipe.

TaskList.description: Gather a list of gin-based cocktail recipes.
Select a random nonalcoholic cocktail recipe and list all ingredients.
Compile the collected gin cocktail recipes and the nonalcoholic recipe into a single document for easy reference.
